string.text: Shortly after Major Kolyazin's insubordination, the Ukrainian military organized search operations for the missing conscripts in the Zone. As a result, one severely wounded soldier was found on the battlefield, who revealed what had happened. All reports and testimonies related to this incident were classified, and the clients from SPECTRUM unsuccessfully tried to locate them outside the perimeter. However, information about the battle in the town of Kurchatov leaked out and became the subject of tales and rumors among the stalkers, embellished with new details.
After these events, Shroud was seen in the Bar only once, looking for Borland. It's unknown whether he found him or not, but no one else has encountered him in the Zone since.

Some say that someone spotted his remains in the Swamps, perhaps perished while searching for Borland. Experienced stalkers believe that he formed his own group called "The Fearless Ones" and took control of the center of the Zone. Turning young stalkers away, and showing no mercy to bandits and military personnel.

Rookies who came to the Zone after these events, in search of artifacts and loot, told tales of a stalker who returned to the mainland incredibly wealthy. Buying a house in California and a yacht he named "100 Rads."

No one knows for sure what happened to Shroud, where he is now and whether he managed to escape from the Zone alive or not. Nevertheless, he became a legendary stalker. Experienced stalkers took pride in having known him personally, and rookies saw him as an example to emulate.
